description: Using natural CO₂ refrigerant, it delivers high temperatures up to 70°C and now supports return temperatures up to 40°C, offering even greater flexibility for system design and operation. Available in three models and two acoustic variants (Low Noise and Ultra Low Noise), Acer is ideal for retrofits and new builds alike. It’s quick to install, manufactured in the UK and features advanced noise control, inverter technology, BMS integration, and optional coated coils.

Up to 90KW of heat at 80°C hot water at -5°C ambient temperature, all at exceptionally low noise levels. The Birch ULN is also made to be super easy to maintain and comes with all the high quality features expected on a Clade heat pump.

Elm R290 high temperature heat pump, a groundbreaking solution for high-temperature heating needs. Engineered as a direct replacement for traditional boilers, the Elm delivers up to 80°C flow temperature with 70°C return while achieving 100% heat decarbonisation without requiring modifications to your existing building infrastructure. Available in 50kW and 70kW models, this heat pump utilises environmentally friendly R290 propane refrigerant.

These heat pumps are bespoke to each and every installation so that we optimise the size of the heat exchangers for the flow and temperatures at both the evaporators and condensers. Using r600a or CO2, we’ll select the refrigerant based on the temperature profiles, for the lowest climate impact with GWPs of 3 and 1 respectively. Available up to 400KW in a single unit for r600a, larger for CO2, which keeps the hydrocarbon gas charge at a manageable level they can be multiplexed together for higher duties.

description: Close-coupled CO₂ air source heat pump with integrated V-shape upflow evaporators. 370 kW heating and 245 kW cooling. Compact single-unit design combining rack and evaporators for simplified installation.
notes: R744 CO₂ GWP 1. 3 compressors, VSD optional. 4 evaporators with EC fans and cold gas defrost. Siemens PLC, Modbus/Profinet. 130 kg refrigerant charge. Design pressure 140/80 bar. Evaporator LpA approx 46 dB(A).
Danish-built. CO₂ transcritical. 4-8 compressors (VSD/cylinder unloader). Available as air-to-water or water-to-water. COP 3.0-3.5 at nominal conditions. Glycol defrost. Walk-in enclosure option.
Danish-built. CO₂ transcritical. 6 compressors (cylinder unloader). 3~400V/690V 50Hz. Available as air-to-water or water-to-water. COP 3.0-3.5 at nominal conditions. Walk-in enclosure option.

Danish-built. CO₂ transcritical. 8 compressors (cylinder unloader). 3~400V/690V 50Hz. 3,000 kW heating capacity. Multiple racks can be combined — e.g. 5 x H-2600 = 13 MW (Haderslev district heating). Walk-in enclosure option.

Danish-built. CO₂ transcritical. 3-4 compressors (VSD). Patented ejector technology. Available as air-to-water or water-to-water. COP 3.0-3.5 at nominal 40/70°C return/supply, 5°C/85%RH. Evaporator noise: 40 dB(A) at 10m. Walk-in enclosure option.

Danish-built. R600a isobutane — high-temperature natural refrigerant. Screw compressor, 3-step (50/75/100%) or VSD. Supply up to 95°C. COP range 3.0-6.0 depending on conditions. Water-to-water only. Ventilated reach-in cabinet for machine room. 690V supply. Heat pump, chiller, or combined operation. Up to 3 units in series (3 MW).

Danish-built. R600a isobutane. Screw compressor, stepless 25-100%. Supply up to 95°C. COP range 3.2-6.4 depending on conditions. Water-to-water only. 690V supply. Heat pump, chiller, or combined operation. Up to 3 units in series (6 MW). Tønder Biogas project: 3 x HCI-3000 delivering 5-7 MW.

Danish-built. R290 propane — low-temperature natural refrigerant. Screw compressor, 3-step or VSD. Source temps down to -30°C evaporator. Supply up to 75°C. COP range 3.0-6.0. Water-to-water only. Ventilated cabinet. 690V supply. Can be combined with HCI isobutane units in serial hydraulic couplings.

Danish-built. R290 propane. Screw compressor, stepless 25-100%. Source temps down to -30°C evaporator. Supply up to 75°C. COP range 3.5-6.5. Water-to-water only. 690V supply. Up to 3 units in series (6 MW). Can be combined with HCI isobutane units.

description: Hisense Hi-Therma Monobloc R32 air-to-water heat pump for space heating, domestic hot water and cooling. Single-phase model.
notes: Model AHZ-100HCDS1. Power supply AC 1Φ, 220-240V/50Hz. Brochure table indicates same performance for single-phase and three-phase versions. A7/W35 capacity 10 kW, COP 5.1. A7/W55 capacity 10 kW, COP 3.1. A-7/W35 capacity 9.5 kW, COP 3.1. A-7/W55 capacity 8 kW, COP 2.15. Cooling A35/W7 8.5 kW, EER 3.0; A35/W18 9 kW, EER 4.5. SCOP W35 4.8 (ηs 188%, A+++), SCOP W55 3.4 (ηs 133%, A++). Sound pressure normal/low/night 47/43/42 dB(A); sound power 61 dB(A). Working ranges: heating -25~35°C ambient, 20~65°C water; cooling 5~46°C ambient, 5~22°C water; DHW -25~43°C ambient, 30~60°C water (75°C with DHW electric heater). Space heating pipe connection G 1 inch female.

description: High-temperature air source heat pump with 2-stage screw compressor technology. 460 kW at A10/W45 and 412 kW at A2/W82. For large buildings and local/district heating networks operating down to -20°C outdoor temperature.
notes: Low GWP refrigerant. Shell and tube condenser. Speed-controlled fans. Compact design.

description: Medium-temperature brine-to-water heat pump series with screw compressors for ground source applications. Same platform as IWWS with brine circuit for geothermal probes, energy piles and horizontal collectors.
notes: Wear-resistant compact screw compressors. Shell and tube heat exchangers for maximum service life.

description: Ultra-high temperature heat pump producing up to 130°C for industrial process heat and steam generation. Paper, food and chemical industries, waste heat utilisation and district heating. TRL9, commercially available.
notes: R1233zd. Semi-hermetic screw compressor, single-stage. COP 3.2 at 50/55→100/110°C, 2.3 at 55/60→125/130°C (IEA HPT Annex 58). IWWDS 430 R4b: 500 kW, 4 t, 4 m² footprint. TÜV-certified test lab to 130°C.

description: Compact high-temperature water-to-water heat pump with scroll compressors. 82°C flow for heat recovery in hotels, food-processing, pharmaceutical industries and data centres. Hygienically critical hot water for hospitals and retirement homes. Cascadeable as desired.
notes: Scroll compressors. Source temps +10 to +42°C. Booster solution for low-temperature heating systems. Reference: District Hospital Schwaz (IWWHC 60 + 30 P2d).

description: High-temperature water-to-water heat pump with two-stage refrigerant circuit enabling high temperature lift. 350-850 kW for process technology and district heating networks.
notes: Screw compressors designed for heavy-duty continuous use. High-performance cooling system with internal circuit. Reference: Blizzard ski factory Mittersill (IWWHS 110 ER2C3, 77°C from 28°C press coolant).

description: High-temperature water-to-water heat pump with single-stage refrigerant circuit. 60-550 kW reaching 95°C flow. High efficiency from low temperature rise using process heat or heat recovery sources.
notes: Screw compressors for high temperatures. Reference: District Hospital Schwaz 80°C hygienic hot water. IWWHS ER2C2 example: 460 kW at L10/W45, 9.6 t, 8.0x2.4x2.7 m.

description: Medium-temperature water-to-water heat pump series with compact screw compressors. 110 kW to 1.1 MW for large buildings: offices, hospitals, production halls. Sources include groundwater, geothermal, waste water, refrigeration systems and data centre waste heat.
notes: Staged, infinitely variable or inverter (IWWSV) output control. Shell and tube heat exchangers. References: IKEA Innsbruck (2x IWWS 520 ER2), biomass plant Hall (IWWSV 985 ER6a + IWWS 900 R6a flue gas heat recovery).

description: High-efficiency air/water split heat pump with horizontal evaporator. World record COP of 4.4 at A2/W35 (certified by Swiss IES).
notes: R407C. A++ ErP. 10-year guarantee on evaporator housing. COP 5.3 at A10/W35, 4.4 at A2/W35, 3.6 at A-7/W35.

description: Mid-range air/water split heat pump with horizontal evaporator. Active cooling capable.
notes: R407C. A++ ErP. Improved noise insulation. Self-diagnostics built in.

description: Largest residential GMLW split heat pump at 25.8 kW. Active cooling capable.
notes: R407C. A++ ErP. Suitable for larger homes and light commercial applications.

description: Largest model in the Cosy range at 12 kW, built for larger or older homes with heat loss up to 11.2 kW. R290 air source heat pump with the same smart controls and app integration as the rest of the Cosy family. Flow temperatures up to 75°C suit retrofit radiator systems.
notes: R290 propane, GWP 3. Newest addition to the Cosy line. MCS-designed. Only available installed by Octopus Energy.

description: Entry-level 6 kW R290 air source heat pump from Octopus Energy, UK-designed and supplied only through Octopus. Suits 1-4 bed homes with heat loss under 5.6 kW. Smart control via the Cosy Hub and Octopus app with up to four wireless room sensors, plus Hush Mode for quieter running. Flow temperatures up to 75°C for compatibility with existing radiators.
notes: R290 propane, GWP 3. SCOP 3.4 at 50°C flow (A++); MCS minimum guaranteed SCOP 2.8; real-world owners report 3.2-4.1. Compact 855x1125mm. Optimised for the Cosy Octopus smart tariff. Only available installed by Octopus.

description: Mid-size 9 kW R290 air source heat pump from Octopus Energy. Suits 3-5 bed homes with heat loss up to 8.7 kW. Same R290 technology, smart Cosy Hub control and app monitoring as the Cosy 6, scaled for larger heat demand. Flow temperatures up to 75°C.
notes: R290 propane, GWP 3. SCOP ~3.4 at 50°C flow. MCS-designed room-by-room. Only available installed by Octopus Energy.

description: Piston compressor heat pump reaching up to 120°C — the highest temperature in the Oilon range. 1-6 compressors, 30-450 kW per unit.
notes: Excellent partial load efficiency. Wide capacity range. Direct district heating compatible. Series connection for higher temps.

description: Scroll compressor heat pump for flow temps up to 65°C. 2-4 compressors per unit, 100-1000 kW range.
notes: Finnish manufacturer est. 1961. Suited for ~0°C input streams. Oilon Selection Tool for system design.

description: Large screw compressor heat pump with shell and tube heat exchangers. 600-2000 kW. Two screw compressors per unit.
notes: For very high capacity applications. Process industry, large buildings, district heating/cooling.

description: Compact screw compressor heat pump with plate heat exchangers. 180-580 kW. Flow temps up to 85°C.
notes: Shell and plate HEX. Suited for process industry, building climate control, district heating.

description: Large-scale high temperature heat pump producing 1 MWth up to 150°C. For industrial decarbonisation, steam pre-heating and district heating networks recovering industrial waste heat.
notes: HCFO R1233zd(E) / R1234ze(Z) options. COP ~3.8. Customisable to process requirements.

description: Very high temperature heat pump producing useful heat up to 140°C, for industrial processes requiring temperatures above 100°C. Takes advantage of lower-temperature heat sources to satisfy higher-temperature demand efficiently.
notes: HCFO R1233zd(E), ultra-low GWP. 120 kWth nominal. COP ~4. Heat revalorisation technology.

description: High-capacity industrial heat pump, 1.5 MWth, delivering up to 150°C. Designed for energy-intensive sectors replacing gas boilers with electrified high-grade heat.
notes: HCFO R1233zd(E). COP ~3.7. Engineered to order. Significant energy and carbon savings vs fossil heating.

description: Largest standard Rank heat pump at 2 MWth. Very high temperature output up to 150°C for industrial decarbonisation. The top of the heat revalorisation range.
notes: HCFO R1233zd(E). COP ~3.5. Customisable to specific process requirements. UK distribution via Simply Renewables.

description: Mid-range industrial high-temperature heat pump. 300 kWth output up to 140°C from low-grade waste heat streams. Ideal for food processing, drying and pasteurisation duties.
notes: HCFO R1233zd(E). Wide modulation. Pairs with Rank ORC systems for combined heat and power recovery.

description: High temperature industrial heat pump, 500 kWth. Up to 140°C output with COP of 4. Replaces fossil-fuel process heating in chemical, paper and food industries.
notes: HCFO R1233zd(E). Heat revalorisation 60 kWth-2 MWth at 100-150°C. UK distribution via Simply Renewables.

description: Smallest Rank high-temperature heat pump for industrial heat revalorisation. Recovers low-grade waste heat and upgrades it to useful process heat up to 120°C. Suited to compact installations and pilot decarbonisation projects.
notes: HCFO R1233zd(E), ultra-low GWP. COP up to 4 at low temperature lift. Spanish manufacturer (Catalonia). UK distribution via Simply Renewables.

description: Combined heating and cooling solution balancing energy and comfort across all seasons, with the full 40-170°C delivery range including process heat, hot water and steam alongside building comfort duties.
notes: Full temperature range combi configuration. Platform uses 4 hydrocarbons selected per application: propane R290 (heat 30-65°C), isobutane R600a (50-95°C), n-butane R600 (70-120°C), isopentane R601a (90-170°C). GWP ~0.02. Up to 4 compressor units per module. Machine room <75 dB. Modbus TCP/IP. 100,000 h design life. FAT factory testing. H&V News Awards 2024 winner.

description: Modular air-to-water heat pump with brine-coupled air coolers for maximum installation flexibility. District heating, space heating, process heat, hot water and steam up to 170°C. Air coolers can be placed freely and installed by local contractors.
notes: Brine intermediate circuit between air coolers and heat pump. Platform uses 4 hydrocarbons selected per application: propane R290 (heat 30-65°C), isobutane R600a (50-95°C), n-butane R600 (70-120°C), isopentane R601a (90-170°C). GWP ~0.02. Up to 4 compressor units per module. Machine room <75 dB. Modbus TCP/IP. 100,000 h design life. FAT factory testing. H&V News Awards 2024 winner.

description: Modular air-to-water heat pump with direct refrigerant evaporation in the air coolers, eliminating exchanger losses and cooling-circuit pumps for optimum efficiency. Designed for modern district heating production.
notes: Direct expansion air coolers — highest efficiency of the air-source range. Platform uses 4 hydrocarbons selected per application: propane R290 (heat 30-65°C), isobutane R600a (50-95°C), n-butane R600 (70-120°C), isopentane R601a (90-170°C). GWP ~0.02. Up to 4 compressor units per module. Machine room <75 dB. Modbus TCP/IP. 100,000 h design life. FAT factory testing. H&V News Awards 2024 winner.

description: Modular water-to-water heat pump covering all temperature levels: process cooling, cold rooms, surplus heat recovery and comfort cooling from -30 to +95°C source, with heat delivery 40-170°C including hot water and steam. COP up to 8 with favourable temperature lift.
notes: Water or brine cold circuit. Source range -30 to +95°C. Platform uses 4 hydrocarbons selected per application: propane R290 (heat 30-65°C), isobutane R600a (50-95°C), n-butane R600 (70-120°C), isopentane R601a (90-170°C). GWP ~0.02. Up to 4 compressor units per module. Machine room <75 dB. Modbus TCP/IP. 100,000 h design life. FAT factory testing. H&V News Awards 2024 winner.

description: Combined air/water and water/water heat pump for year-round operation: air-source heating in winter, comfort cooling in summer, and cooling-to-heating recovery in spring and autumn. One plant, three functions.
notes: Seasonal switching between air source and water source operation. Platform uses 4 hydrocarbons selected per application: propane R290 (heat 30-65°C), isobutane R600a (50-95°C), n-butane R600 (70-120°C), isopentane R601a (90-170°C). GWP ~0.02. Up to 4 compressor units per module. Machine room <75 dB. Modbus TCP/IP. 100,000 h design life. FAT factory testing. H&V News Awards 2024 winner.

description: Industrial-scale ammonia air source heat pump for buildings, district heating and industrial heat. Extracts heat directly from ambient air. Ideal for new build and retrofit; can be commissioned and charged before delivery to cut installation time.
notes: R717 ammonia, GWP 0. Heats to 85°C without HFCs. Reference: Hillpark Glasgow — UK’s largest residential air source heat pump, halved energy costs for high-rise flats.

description: High-temperature configuration of the Neatpump for industrial process heat, reaching up to 120°C in certain applications by recovering waste heat streams. Used in whisky distilling, sugar refining and pharmaceutical sectors.
notes: R717 ammonia. Up to 120°C process heat. Reference: Nestle Halifax — free hot water from waste heat recovery. Can combine heating, cooling and desalination simultaneously (efficiency up to 7).

description: Industrial-scale ammonia water source heat pump for district heating and industrial process heat. Module capacities 500 kW to 8 MW (largest site 14.3 MW). Extracts heat from rivers, lakes, seawater, mineshafts, aquifers and industrial waste streams. Simultaneous heating and cooling: delivers >3 kW heating and 2 kW cooling per 1 kW electricity.
notes: R717 ammonia, GWP 0, zero ODP. Heats to 85°C standard, up to 90°C (Drammen). Bespoke factory-tested modular design built in Glasgow. References: Queens Quay Clydebank (Scotland’s largest WSHP district heating), Drammen Norway (world’s largest 90°C natural heat pump, €2m/yr savings).

description: Second-generation monobloc air source heat pump using R290 propane with high delta-T design. Maximum heating capacity 115 kW, sustaining 90 kW even at -5°C ambient. Flow temperatures up to 70°C for district heating and commercial buildings including domestic hot water. Distributed in the UK by SAV Systems.
notes: R290 propane, GWP 0.02 (sometimes cited as 3). Nominal COP 3.67 at 7°C ambient, 45/30°C water. 90 kW at -5°C ambient. 400V/50Hz/3-phase. Designed for heating-first operation with large delta-T (~30°C) and low return temperatures to maximise SCOP.

description: Water-to-water high-temperature heat pump for active heat recovery via cooling water. 105 kW module, with heat production up to 85°C from source temperatures of 15-50°C cooled directly in the heat exchanger. One of 8 sizes (30-200 kW per compressor); unlimited cascading possible.
notes: R290 propane. Innovative high-temperature compressor for heat recovery above conventional compressor limits. Applications: flue gas/engine cooling, district heating return cooling, solar heating, IT/server cooling, machine cooling, process and biogas waste heat, refrigeration condenser heat. Vibration/noise-dampened cabinet, Modbus control, ThermoNova controller with cascade support. COP varies widely with source/sink temperatures.

description: Trianco Activair High Temperature R290 air-to-water heat pump, designed and built in the UK.
notes: Trianco Activair High Temperature R290 air source heat pump from Trianco (TR Engineering, Sheffield; UK manufacturer). Inverter, R290 refrigerant (GWP 3), high flow temperature suitable for hot water and radiators without immersion top-up. MCS and Kitemark accredited (qualifies for the Boiler Upgrade Scheme grant). Smart-app control with built-in 4G SIM for remote monitoring and commissioning. A++ ErP. Rated at A7/W35 (7C ambient, 35C water outlet). 230V single phase, IPX4. Max heating capacity range 5.40-14.95 kW (A7/W35).
